# Forge Atlas Copilot Instructions

This repo is Forge Atlas.

## Rules
- Do not touch sealed files:
  - public/js/emery.js
  - public/css/emery.css
  - dedication text
  - dedication meta tag

- Do not add secrets to repo.
- Do not print API keys.
- Do not fake live users, traffic, analytics, votes, or AI activity.
- Synthetic/demo activity must be labeled Demo/Synthetic/Simulation.
- Real stats must come from real sources.
- Keep command center owner-only/private.
- Prefer small reversible changes.
- Mobile-first.
- Respect prefers-reduced-motion.
- Human approval required before deploy/push/commit.

## Project Direction
Forge Atlas is becoming a safe dynamic AI ecosystem:
- Swarm
- Arena/Fight Club
- AI Forum
- GPT + Claude relay
- Cloudflare AI
- local Termux HQ
- private command center
